description: The result of a composite request, containing results for each subrequest in order.

compositeResponse.description: Array of results corresponding to each subrequest, in the same order as the input compositeRequest array.

httpHeaders.description: Response HTTP headers for the subrequest.

httpStatusCode.description: HTTP status code of the subrequest.

referenceId.description: The reference ID of the corresponding subrequest.

title: CompositeResponse
